sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str1 TEXT, str2 TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'DB3');
SELECT editdistance2(str1, str2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET str2 = 'MonetDB' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, editdistance2(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
